---
title: "Film Study Video Quality Audit"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  data_dir: "data/processed/film_study"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
data_dir <- params$data_dir

read_csv_if_exists <- function(name) {
  path <- file.path(data_dir, name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(data.frame())
  }
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

audit <- read_csv_if_exists("video_quality_audit.csv")
summary_path <- file.path(data_dir, "video_quality_audit_summary.json")
summary_lines <- if (file.exists(summary_path)) readLines(summary_path, warn = FALSE) else "Video quality summary not created yet."
```

# Overview

This private audit checks local source-video technical quality for film study. It does not infer anything about legality or source rights. It only describes the files already present on disk.

```{r summary}
cat(paste(summary_lines, collapse = "\n"))
```

# Quality Audit Table

```{r audit}
audit
```

# Quality Tier Counts

```{r tier-plot}
if (nrow(audit) > 0) {
  counts <- sort(table(audit$quality_tier), decreasing = TRUE)
  barplot(counts, col = "#157878", border = NA, main = "Video Quality Tiers", ylab = "Videos")
}
```
